title: Justify-AI – Explainable Hate Analysis
description: Explainable, multilingual hate-analysis framework built with classical NLP and Naive Bayes, combining lexical, causal, and demographic signals for interpretable risk scoring.
concept: Justify-AI addresses the need for transparent, interpretable hate speech detection without relying on black-box transformers. It supports multiple Indian languages with clear risk breakdowns, making AI decisions auditable and understandable for research and moderation workflows.
architecture: Classical NLP pipeline: Language Detection → Language-specific preprocessing (tokenization, stemming, lemmatization) → Hate lexicon matching with severity spans → Rule-based causality extraction → Demographic bias auditing → Composite risk scoring → FastAPI backend + visual dashboard.
differentiators: Pure statistical NLP—no transformers, fully interpretable pipeline
Multilingual support: English, Hindi, Marathi, Bhojpuri, Marwari
Transparent risk scoring with lexical + causal + bias breakdowns
Visual dashboard wired directly to backend analytical outputs

title: Local AI Dashcam – Incident Explainer
description: Fully local, privacy-preserving dashcam incident analysis using YOLO11, SORT tracking, optical flow, and local VLMs via Ollama—no cloud APIs required.
concept: Solves automated incident detection and explanation from dashcam footage while maintaining complete privacy. Ideal for scenarios where sensitive video data cannot leave local infrastructure, delivering intelligent analysis with zero internet dependency.
architecture: 5-phase pipeline: (1) FFmpeg keyframe extraction with motion scoring, (2) Incident detection via YOLO11+SORT+Farneback optical flow fusion, (3) Multi-modal VLM narration using MiniCPM-V + Mistral 7B via Ollama, (4) Privacy filtering with face/LP blurring, (5) Gradio UI + ReportLab PDF export.
differentiators: 100% offline operation—no cloud APIs or internet required
Multi-modal AI: combines object tracking, optical flow, and VLMs
Automatic privacy enforcement with face and license plate blurring
Academic-grade evaluation with BLEU/ROUGE metrics and ablation studies

title: VaniCure – AI Respiratory Diagnostics
description: Offline-first medical screening app using deep learning to analyze respiratory audio (coughs, breathing) for TB and Asthma risk prediction—designed for remote clinics with zero cloud dependency.
concept: Solves accessible respiratory diagnostics in resource-constrained settings by running full AI inference locally on-device. Protects patient privacy with complete offline operation while delivering ensemble-model predictions and multilingual triage support for health workers.
architecture: Multi-model ensemble pipeline: (1) PANNs CNN14 for robust feature extraction, (2) YAMNet for fast anomaly detection, (3) Custom CNN-BiLSTM for targeted respiratory classification. FastAPI backend with React frontend, localStorage patient records, dynamic outbreak alerting, and multilingual triage agent.
differentiators: Three-model ensemble for robust, cross-validated predictions
Complete offline operation—ideal for remote/low-connectivity clinics
Dynamic outbreak alerting based on spatial case clustering
Multilingual triage agent (Hindi, Gujarati, Marathi, English) with exportable patient records

title: Urban Hive – Housing Society Management
description: Complete vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript housing society management platform with role-based dashboards for Residents, Managers, and Workers.
concept: Urban Hive addresses the challenge of digitizing housing society operations with accessible, role-specific interfaces. It eliminates dependency on complex frameworks while delivering a fully responsive, session-based management system for notices, complaints, payments, and task coordination.
architecture: Frontend-only SPA architecture using sessionStorage for auth, modular JavaScript files per role, CSS variables design system, and in-memory data management with CRUD operations for complaints, notices, and tasks.
differentiators: Fully responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile
Demo accounts for instant testing of all three roles
Clean modular structure with separation of concerns

title: NyayaAI – AI Legal Assistant
description: Full-stack AI-powered legal assistant with RAG, LangChain, and intelligent web search.
concept: NyayaAI addresses the challenge of making legal information accessible and understandable. Traditional legal research is time-consuming and requires expertise. This AI-powered legal assistant provides context-aware, intelligent legal Q&A by combining retrieval-augmented generation with intelligent web search capabilities.
architecture: The system uses a RAG pipeline architecture with LangChain for orchestration. It combines a local knowledge base with real-time web search to provide comprehensive and up-to-date legal information.
differentiators: Context-aware legal Q&A with source citations
Hybrid retrieval combining local knowledge and web search

title: ResolvAI – Offline AI System
description: Privacy-preserving AI app for customer complaint resolution using local LLMs via Ollama.
concept: ResolvAI solves the challenge of AI-powered customer complaint resolution while maintaining complete data privacy. In scenarios where sensitive customer data cannot leave local infrastructure, this system provides intelligent resolution using fully offline LLM inference.
architecture: Built on local LLM infrastructure using Ollama for model serving. LangChain for prompt engineering. All inference happens on-device, ensuring zero data transmission.
differentiators: Complete offline operation for maximum privacy
No API dependencies or per-request costs

title: BharatNiti – Leadership Sim
description: AI-driven political leadership simulation using live news.
concept: BharatNiti converts live political news into interactive decision-making simulations for experiential learning in political science.
architecture: News is parsed into actors, conflicts, constraints, and objectives. Scenarios generated using prompt-engineered LLM pipelines. User responses evaluated across leadership dimensions.
differentiators: Real-world data to simulated governance conversion

title: Bias Detection AI
description: Multimodal fairness intelligence for implicit bias detection.
concept: This system targets implicit bias using multimodal inference to detect subconscious bias patterns in communication and behavior.
architecture: Multimodal inference across three channels: Text (BERT), Audio (Wav2Vec), Video (OpenPose). Bias metrics informed by social psychology frameworks.

title: FaceMark – Attendance System
description: Classical CV attendance system using Haar Cascade and LBPH.
concept: Designed for environments where deep learning is overkill, FaceMark prioritizes simplicity, deployability, and explainability using classical computer vision techniques.
architecture: Pipeline-based CV system using Haar Cascade for face detection and LBPH for feature extraction and classification.

title: India Economic Dashboard
description: Analytics platform for economic indicators with interactive visualizations.
concept: Transforms complex economic indicators into understandable, interactive visualizations for policy analysis and research.
architecture: ETL pipelines normalize multi-scale indicators. Statistical transformations enable fair comparison. Interactive dashboards with Plotly.

title: MarvelTimeVault
description: Cinematic timeline browser with GSAP animations.
concept: MarvelTimeVault transforms movie timeline browsing into an immersive experience using advanced animation techniques and premium interaction design.
architecture: JSON-driven content layer separates data from presentation. Animation-first rendering philosophy with GSAP and ScrollTrigger.

title: BMMCT – Community Platform
description: Community web platform with static-first architecture.
concept: Provides modern digital infrastructure for community organizations with member engagement and event management.
architecture: Static-first, performance-optimized architecture. Year-indexed event archival. Firebase Hosting with global CDN.

title: Pal Classes – Learning Platform
description: Curriculum-aligned platform with concept-first content structuring.
concept: Provides a curriculum-aligned learning platform that organizes content by concepts rather than chapters, enabling deeper understanding.
architecture: Concept-first content structuring. Progressive difficulty layering. Exam-aligned pedagogy.

title: Godfather Chatbot
concept: Maintains faithful character representation through advanced prompt engineering and temperature tuning.
architecture: Prompt-engineered persona locking. Controlled randomness via temperature tuning. LangChain for conversation memory.
